Container.Name: Plex Poster Helper 2
Container.Overview: Browse your Plex library and apply MediUX / ThePosterDB poster sets - follow creators, schedule weekly syncs, and reset posters. Native web UI in your browser (no VNC).
Container.Description: Browse your Plex library and apply MediUX / ThePosterDB poster sets. Full web UI with built-in scheduler.

Config.Name: WebUI
Config.Description: Web UI port. Open http://[IP]:3939 in your browser. Sign in with Plex to access the app.

Config.Name: Config
Config.Description: Config, schedules, applied-poster history, and installed Chromium.
